entries.title: Gimme Job Listings API on RapidAPI
entries.description: A new API offering exposes normalized job listings, search filters, facets, provider counts, dataset stats, expired IDs, backfill feeds, and incremental sync routes for teams building on job data.

entries.title: Form snapshot review tools
entries.description: Admin review screens now make captured fields easier to inspect, map, note, approve, or flag when a field is hidden, unrelated, or should be handled manually.

entries.title: Safer application form detection
entries.description: Assist mode has better handling for select fields, country-style inputs, hidden fields, honeypots, and CAPTCHA-style prompts so autofill can avoid the wrong controls.

entries.title: Refined public pages and brand assets
entries.description: Marketing pages now use the updated Gimme Job logo set, improved dark and light mode styling, cleaner pricing/API cards, and downloadable brand assets.

entries.title: Smarter job application autofill
entries.description: Location, typeahead, and combobox fields now fill reliably across Rippling, Greenhouse, and other React-based ATS forms.

entries.title: Expired job detection learns from every page
entries.description: When a job listing is expired or closed, we capture the exact wording so future checks are faster and more accurate across all job boards.

entries.title: Application confirmation detection
entries.description: After submitting an application, the system now detects 'thank you' and confirmation messages to verify your submission actually went through.

entries.title: Dark mode for marketing pages
entries.description: The landing page, features, pricing, and changelog now respect your system theme preference with a light/dark toggle in the header.
